audit_items.proof_trace: ldap_pvt_thread_rdwr_writers() returns int (declared LDAP_F(int) in ldap_pvt_thread.h:177), not a pointer — NULL-dereference of an integer return value is not possible in C. Both callers (rdwr.c:455 adds integers; thr_debug.c:1157 forwards the integer) treat the return as a plain integer count, never dereferencing it as a pointer. The function is also debug-only (#ifdef LDAP_RDWR_DEBUG / LDAP_DEBUG) and absent from production builds.
